channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: world
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: world

item.title: About 10 killed at adult education center in what officials say is Sweden's worst mass shooting
item.description: About 10 people, including the gunman, were killed on Tuesday at an adult education center in what Sweden’s prime minister called the country’s worst mass shooting. But a final death toll, a conclusive number of wounded and a motive hadn’t yet been determined hours later.
item.dc:creator: STEFANIE DAZIO, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Greenland looks to ban foreign political donations
item.description: Greenland’s Parliament on Tuesday debated whether it would ban political donations from foreign or anonymous contributors.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, The Hill

item.title: As hundreds of quakes rattle Greek islands, a few brave tourists have Santorini to themselves
item.description: SANTORINI, Greece (AP) — The hundreds of earthquakes that have rattled Greek islands on the Aegean Sea are a “seismic swarm" and could continue for weeks before eventually diminishing, the Santorini mayor told The Associated Press on Tuesday — pausing to chuckle as new tremors shook items on his des
item.dc:creator: DEREK GATOPOULOS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: China to investigate Google amid tensions with US
item.description: China said Tuesday it is investigating Google for potential antitrust violations after the Trump administration levied new tariffs on Beijing.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Trump wants rare earth elements from Ukraine in exchange for military aid
item.description: “We're looking to do a deal with Ukraine, where they're going to secure what we're giving them with their rare earth and other things,” he told reporters.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Frazin, WGN 9

item.title: El Salvador offers to house 'American criminals,' deportees: Rubio
item.description: El Salvador has offered to house criminals who are American citizens and deportees of other nationalities, according to Secretary of State Marco Rubio.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: China hits US with retaliatory tariffs
item.description: China hit the U.S. with retaliatory tariffs across the board over President Trump’s enforcement of tariffs on Chinese goods that went into effect Tuesday. China’s Ministry of Finance announced the countermeasures, imposing a 15 percent tariff on liquefied natural gas and coal.
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, The Hill

item.title: Trump's tariff delay is 'opportunity' for Mexico: Ex-DEA chief
item.description: "It's an opportunity for Mexico to go after the cartels," said Ray Donovan, the former DEA chief of operations.
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Vargas, The Hill

item.title: US aid freeze puts at risk Ukraine’s wartime help for frontline evacuees
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump's decision to freeze for 90 days the humanitarian aid that the United States provides to countries overseas is being felt in places far from Washington.
item.dc:creator: Hanna Arhirova, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Middle East latest: Hamas officials say they've started talks on the second phase of the ceasefire
item.description: Hamas officials say they’ve begun talks with international mediators over the second phase of the ceasefire in Gaza that began last month.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: A Russia-like crackdown has jailed dozens in Georgia, with human rights groups sounding the alarm
item.description: TBILISI, Georgia (AP) — Jailed journalist Mzia Amaghlobeli gets weaker every day as her hunger strike has reached three weeks in Rustavi, a town near the Georgian capital of Tbilisi, her lawyer says.
item.dc:creator: SOPHIKO MEGRELIDZE and DASHA LITVINOVA, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Middle East latest: Hostages freed from Gaza rarely saw sunlight, families say
item.description: The families of hostages freed from Gaza over the weekend, the latest release in the ceasefire deal, described difficult conditions — including rarely seeing the sun — during their captivity.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Australian teenager dies in devastating shark attack, nearly 100 yards from popular beach: report
item.description: An Australian teenager from near Brisbane died on Monday after being bitten by a shark nearly 100 yards from the beach, according to reports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump wants rare earth elements from Ukraine in exchange for military aid
item.description: President Trump indicated Monday he wants a deal for rare earth elements and other items from Ukraine in exchange for continued military aid in the nation’s war against Russia. “We're handing them money hand over fist. We're giving them equipment,” Trump said Monday.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Frazin, The Hill

item.title: Trump orders creation of US sovereign wealth fund, says it could own part of TikTok
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — President Donald Trump on Monday signed an executive order directing the U.S. to take steps to start developing a government-owned investment fund that he said could be used to profit off of TikTok if he's successful at finding it an American buyer.
item.dc:creator: ZEKE MILLER and HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: What USAID does, and why Trump and Musk want to get rid of it
item.description: In its first two weeks, President Donald Trump’s administration has made significant changes to the U.S. Agency for International Development.
item.dc:creator: Ellen Knickmeyer And Meg Kinnard, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Emergency crews deployed on Santorini as earthquake swarm worries Greek experts
item.description: More than 200 undersea earthquakes have been detected near the Greek island of Santorini over the past three days, worrying Greek experts and island residents alike.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: South Africa hits back at Trump’s claim that it is ‘confiscating land,' as US aid to country threatened
item.description: The South African president has hit back at President Donald Trump for claiming the government is "confiscating" land. President Trump also claimed certain classes of people are being treated ‘very badly.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Their sacred land was a gift for their courage. Yet Maká people in Paraguay fight for its ownership
item.description: ASUNCIÓN, Paraguay (AP) — Many Maká traditions have slowly faded. Yet a few elders among these Paraguayan Indigenous people recall how their songs imitated birds.
item.dc:creator: MARÍA TERESA HERNÁNDEZ, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump urged to look into US funding of Lebanese army amid accusations of its ties to Hezbollah
item.description: Amid a resurgence of Hezbollah activity on Israel’s border there are new calls for the Trump administration to push the Lebanese state to root out Hezbollah and slash aid to the country’s army.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: UK's Starmer seeks strong trade relations with the US in the wake of Trump's tariffs
item.description: LONDON (AP) — British Prime Minister Keir Starmer said Sunday that he would seek a strong trade relationship with the U.S. after President Donald Trump suggested he would slap Europe with tariffs after he hit America's biggest trading partners — Canada, Mexico and China — with import taxes.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MELLEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: US-backed commander says his Kurdish-led group wants a secular and civil state in post-Assad Syria
item.description: HASSAKEH, Syria (AP) — The commander of the main U.S.-backed force in Syria said Sunday the recent ouster of the Assad family from power should be followed by building a secular, civil and decentralized state that treats all its citizens equally no matter their religion or ethnicity.
item.dc:creator: BASSEM MROUE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Funeral for slain Hezbollah leader Hassan Nasrallah set for Feb. 23
item.description: BEIRUT (AP) — The Lebanese Hezbollah group Sunday announced the funeral of its longtime leader will take place on Feb. 23, months after he was assassinated in a series of Israeli airstrikes in a southern Beirut suburb.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: EU warns Trump it would ‘respond firmly’ to tariffs
item.description: “The EU would respond firmly to any trading partner that unfairly or arbitrarily imposes tariffs on EU goods,” a spokesperson said. “There is a lot at stake.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Irwin, NewsNation

item.title: Rubio visiting Central America with the Panama Canal and immigration top of mind
item.description: PANAMA CITY (AP) — Secretary of State Marco Rubio is on his first foreign trip in office, arriving in Central America on Saturday to press President Donald Trump's top priority — curbing illegal immigration — and to bring the message that the U.S.
item.dc:creator: MATTHEW LEE, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Sick and wounded children begin crossing into Egypt as Rafah crossing opens after several months
item.description: RAFAH CROSSING, Egypt (AP) — A group of 50 sick and wounded Palestinian children began entering Egypt for treatment through Gaza’s Rafah crossing on Saturday, the first opening of the border since Israel captured it nearly nine months ago.
item.dc:creator: AHMED HATEM and AMR NABIL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump says he ordered airstrikes on Islamic State in Somalia
item.description: "These killers, who we found hiding in caves, threatened the United States and our Allies," Trump said in a post on Truth Social.
item.dc:creator: Sean Noone, NewsNation

item.title: Rubio heads to Panama, Latin America to pursue Trump's 'Golden Age' agenda
item.description: Secretary of State Marco Rubio is set to visit Panama in his first official visit abroad as part of what the State Department said is to underscore President Donald Trump's vision of re-establishing a "Golden Era.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump uniquely placed to ‘whisper’ in Erdogan’s ear over Turkish regional ambitions: Greek defense minister
item.description: Greek Defense Minister Nikos Dendias said NATO needs to take seriously Turkey's expansionist ambitions and President Erdoğan's desire to "recreate the Ottoman Empire" amid aggression.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Hamas releases 3 more hostages, including US citizen, as part of fragile ceasefire deal
item.description: Hamas on Saturday freed three more hostages, including American-Israeli Keith Siegel, in the latest phase of a fragile ceasefire with Israel.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trump invites Israel's Netanyahu to meet with him at the White House next week
item.description: WADI GAZA, Gaza Strip (AP) — President Donald Trump has invited Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu to the White House next week as the first foreign leader to visit in Trump's second term, Netanhayu and the White House said Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: WAFAA SHURAFA and MELANIE LIDMAN, Associated Press, NewsNation
